name: /risk-classify: emitted yaml records source_framework: eu-ai-act so the classification is traceable
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case credit-scoring --emit "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" && grep "^source_framework: eu-ai-act" compliance/risk-classification.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
